---
title: "Resource use in training"
author: "Vincent J. Carey, stvjc at channing.harvard.edu"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
vignette: >
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Resource use in training}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
output:
  BiocStyle::html_document:
    highlight: pygments
    number_sections: yes
    theme: united
    toc: yes
---

# Simple measurement

The `nvidia-smi` utility can record aspects of GPU utilization.
We have used

```
nvidia-smi --query-gpu=timestamp,\
utilization.gpu,\
utilization.memory,\
memory.used,memory.free,memory.total,\
power.draw,temperature.gpu --format=csv --loop=1 > gpu_trace.csv &
```

to collect data from an example run.  One kills the associated
process when the run completes.

The data are plotted in an elementary way:

```{r lkpl, message=FALSE}
par(mar=c(4,3,2,2))
library(exploreCEHR)
example(plot_trace, ask=FALSE)
```
